what_it_does: Describes the layered method (Tim's steer, 2026-06-08) for making the whole application architecture visible so Claude Design and other agents can design into and integrate with it. Defines a three-layer pipeline (cheap coverage/inventory → smart deep-read/report → smart synthesis with a completeness critic), states a coverage guarantee, gives the Layer-1 five-agent partition (INV-A..INV-E), and records status.
observations: Goal stated up front: make the WHOLE architecture visible/understandable; Tim's caution 'a lot was built, from many angles (6 branches + worktree + vault) — don't underestimate the research.'
Layer 1 = CHEAP models (Haiku) broad parallel fan-out producing research/inventory/<region>.md — location not comprehension, with a PRIORITY flag and ANGLE per file.
Layer 2 = SMART models (Sonnet/Opus) targeted deep-reads keyed off Layer 1, output research/deep/<cluster>.md, covering what it does/contracts/components/seams/public surface/state/connections.
Layer 3 = SMART (Opus) synthesis into the keystone APPLICATION-STRUCTURE-PACK.md plus a COMPLETENESS CRITIC that loops-until-dry on missing angles.
Coverage guarantee: Layer 1 maps every dir across all angles, Layer 2 must cover every PRIORITY-flagged place, Layer 3's critic asks what angle/place/claim was missed.
Layer-1 partition named: INV-A (runtime/store/fabric/contracts/root), INV-B (canvas/design/panels), INV-C (nodes/roles/mcp_face/voice), INV-D (tests/docs/ops/self-description), INV-E (the angles).
Status: Layer 1 launched 2026-06-08 (Haiku ×5); the studio scaffold runs in parallel as the proving slice that proves the pack's USE while this produces its INPUT.
standouts: The cheap→smart→synthesis tiering: use cheap models for broad coverage, smart models for comprehension, reserving the strongest for synthesis + a completeness critic.
The explicit completeness critic with loop-until-dry as a guard against missing angles.
Running the proving slice (studio) in parallel so the pack's USE is validated while its INPUT is still being produced.
conventions: Defines the very method that the inventory files in this directory (INV-C, INV-D, INV-E) instantiate — this is their governing spec.
Carries no frontmatter, unlike the inventory outputs it specifies.
Uses a blockquote for Tim's steer/goal and a code block for the layer diagram.
concerns: No frontmatter despite the pack's vault conventions on self-description notes.
Status section is a point-in-time snapshot (Layer 2 'dispatches when inventory lands') that will not reflect later progress.
notes: The governing spec for this research pack: a three-layer cheap→smart→synthesis method with a coverage guarantee and a completeness critic, plus the five-agent Layer-1 partition the inventory files implement.
questions: Did Layer 2 and Layer 3 (and APPLICATION-STRUCTURE-PACK.md) actually get produced, and where do they live?
Did the completeness critic find missing angles requiring a top-up round?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it sets out a research method and delivers exactly the layered method, coverage guarantee, partition, and status it promises.
apparent_themes: Model-tier-appropriate work (cheap for breadth, smart for depth/synthesis)
Make-the-architecture-visible as a precondition for clean integration
Completeness as an explicit, critic-enforced property
intention_signals: To guarantee thorough, unbiased, coverage-complete understanding of a large system built from many angles, so a design agent can integrate cleanly — by partitioning the work and forcing a completeness check rather than trusting a single broad pass.
novelty: The explicit cheap→smart→synthesis layering with a loop-until-dry completeness critic and a parallel proving slice is a distinctive, reusable research-methodology pattern.
contribution: Contributes the layered research method itself (the three tiers, the coverage guarantee, the INV-A..E partition, the completeness critic, the parallel proving-slice idea) — the governing recipe a fused system would keep for thoroughly mapping a large multi-angle codebase.
summary_for_embedding: A 2026-06-08 research-method spec defining a three-layer cheap-inventory → smart-deep-read → smart-synthesis pipeline with a coverage guarantee, a five-agent Layer-1 partition (INV-A..E), and a completeness critic, aimed at making the whole Company architecture visible.
intention_for_embedding: To define a thorough, coverage-guaranteed method for mapping a large multi-angle codebase so a design agent can understand and integrate into it cleanly.
